description: Black needs to save all the marked stones, ko is fine if black takes first or white risks too much (you'll find white plays to avoid these ko's). Please don't waste your ko-threats unnecessarily. White's strongest resistance is shown (not necessarily best play considering the whole board). I'll add more to some of the wrong variations at some point.
